ogTitle: Callignee South vs Calrossie: Climate Safety

heading: Callignee South vs Calrossie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Callignee South, Victoria and Calrossie, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Callignee South has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Calrossie (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Callignee South or Calrossie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Callignee South has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Calrossie scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Callignee South scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Calrossie scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Callignee South or Calrossie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Callignee South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
